'''âh-g-p''' ('''hagapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prebuy|prebuy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prebuy|prebuy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-g-p
|-
! Lemma
| hagapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hagapithi|hagapithi]] || [[word:hagapiji|hagapiji]] || [[word:hagapishi|hagapishi]] || [[word:hagapi|hagapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hagaputhuth|hagaputhuth]] || [[word:hagapujuj|hagapujuj]] || [[word:hagapushush|hagapushush]] || [[word:hagap|hagap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hagaputhu|hagaputhu]] || [[word:hagapuju|hagapuju]] || [[word:hagapushu|hagapushu]] || [[word:hagapu|hagapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagapufuth|hagapufuth]] || [[word:hagapufuj|hagapufuj]] || [[word:hagapufush|hagapufush]] || [[word:hagapuf|hagapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hagapethe|hagapethe]] || [[word:hagapeje|hagapeje]] || [[word:hagapeshe|hagapeshe]] || [[word:hagape|hagape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hagapothoth|hagapothoth]] || [[word:hagapojoj|hagapojoj]] || [[word:hagaposhosh|hagaposhosh]] || [[word:hagap|hagap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hagapotho|hagapotho]] || [[word:hagapojo|hagapojo]] || [[word:hagaposho|hagaposho]] || [[word:hagapo|hagapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagapofoth|hagapofoth]] || [[word:hagapofoj|hagapofoj]] || [[word:hagapofosh|hagapofosh]] || [[word:hagapof|hagapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hagapĂŠthĂŠ|hagapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hagapĂŠjĂŠ|hagapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hagapĂŠshĂŠ|hagapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hagapĂŠ|hagapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hagapathath|hagapathath]] || [[word:hagapajaj|hagapajaj]] || [[word:hagapashash|hagapashash]] || [[word:hagap|hagap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hagapatha|hagapatha]] || [[word:hagapaja|hagapaja]] || [[word:hagapasha|hagapasha]] || [[word:hagapa|hagapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagapafath|hagapafath]] || [[word:hagapafaj|hagapafaj]] || [[word:hagapafash|hagapafash]] || [[word:hagapaf|hagapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hagapasha|hagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohagapasha|gohagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihagapasha|gokihagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hagapnĂŒsha|hagapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohagapnknĂŒsha|gohagapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihagapnĂŒsha|gokihagapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hagapshĂ«sha|hagapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohagapnkshĂ«sha|gohagapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihagapshĂ«sha|gokihagapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hagaprosha|hagaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohagapnkrosha|gohagapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihagaprosha|gokihagaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hagapmusha|hagapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohagapnkmusha|gohagapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagapmusha|gokihagapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hagapsherasha|hagapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohagapnksherasha|gohagapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihagapsherasha|gokihagapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hagapngasha|hagapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohagapnkngasha|gohagapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihagapngasha|gokihagapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hagapyasha|hagapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohagapnkyasha|gohagapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihagapyasha|gokihagapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hagapyamasha|hagapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohagapnkyamasha|gohagapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihagapyamasha|gokihagapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hagapnĂŒshĂ«sha|hagapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohagapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gohagapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihagapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokihagapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hagapnĂŒrosha|hagapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohagapnknĂŒrosha|gohagapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihagapnĂŒrosha|gokihagapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagapnĂŒmusha|hagapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohagapnknĂŒmusha|gohagapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagapnĂŒmusha|gokihagapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hagapshĂ«nĂŒsha|hagapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohagapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gohagapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihagapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokihagapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hagapshĂ«rosha|hagapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohagapnkshĂ«rosha|gohagapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihagapshĂ«rosha|gokihagapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagapshĂ«musha|hagapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohagapnkshĂ«musha|gohagapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagapshĂ«musha|gokihagapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hagapronĂŒsha|hagapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohagapnkronĂŒsha|gohagapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihagapronĂŒsha|gokihagapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hagaproshĂ«sha|hagaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohagapnkroshĂ«sha|gohagapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihagaproshĂ«sha|gokihagaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagapromusha|hagapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohagapnkromusha|gohagapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagapromusha|gokihagapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hagapmunĂŒsha|hagapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohagapnkmunĂŒsha|gohagapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihagapmunĂŒsha|gokihagapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hagapmushĂ«sha|hagapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohagapnkmushĂ«sha|gohagapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihagapmushĂ«sha|gokihagapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hagapmurosha|hagapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohagapnkmurosha|gohagapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihagapmurosha|gokihagapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hagap|hagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠp|hĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohagap|hohagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠgĂŠp|hohĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohagap|hohohagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠgĂŠp|hohohĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒhagap|nĂŒhagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŒhĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhagap|nĂŒnĂŒhagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻhagap|nĂŻhagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŻhĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhagap|nĂŻnĂŻhagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠgĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhagap|luhagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠgĂŠp|luhĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhagap|luluhagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠgĂŠp|luluhĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihagap|lihagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠgĂŠp|lihĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihagap|lilihagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠgĂŠp|lilihĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohagap|kohagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠgĂŠp|kohĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohagap|kokohagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠgĂŠp|kokohĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehagap|kehagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠgĂŠp|kehĂŠgĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehagap|kekehagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠgĂŠp|kekehĂŠgĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
